title: AgileFlow v4 user config
description: User-facing configuration for AgileFlow v4. Lives at agileflow.config.json in project root.

version.description: Config schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.

plugins.description: Map of plugin-id -> { enabled: bool, settings?: object }. core is always enabled.

hooks.description: Per-hook-id user overrides applied on top of plugin-supplied defaults.

behaviors.description: Curated behavior presets. Each maps to one or more hooks the installer wires up. Disabling a behavior excludes its hooks from the generated hook-manifest.yaml.

loadContext.description: SessionStart: print project context (stories, dirty files, recent commits) for Claude to consume.

babysitDefault.description: SessionStart: inject the babysit-mentor pattern so Claude defaults to mentor mode without explicit invocation.

damageControl.description: PreToolUse: block dangerous Bash commands and risky Edit/Write paths via the patterns library.

preCompactState.description: PreCompact: capture story IDs, active command, and dirty git state so they survive Claude's compaction summary.
